vulnerability.reference: Designers over-trust AI-generated topologies due to automation bias, skipping manual sanity checks.
vulnerability.generated: Designers' overreliance on automated design rule checks as a proxy for functional correctness, with insufficient manual verification of LLM-generated topologies.

impact.reference: Fabricated chips with hidden functional failures cause costly silicon re-spins and project delays.
impact.generated: Fabricated analog ICs fail functionally, causing costly respins, schedule delays, and eroding trust in AI-assisted EDA tools.

dose_response.reference: RL-optimized LLM generating plausible but incorrect topologies enables undetected flaws, which in EDA tool integration leads to fabricated chips with hidden functional failures and costly silicon re-spins.
dose_response.generated: LLM-generated functionally incorrect topologies that pass superficial checks, through analog IC designers using AI-assisted tools, triggers overreliance on automated checks as proxy for functional correctness, leading to IC failures, costly respins, schedule delays, and eroded trust.
